mentions.note: Off highs like Nvidia; consistently recommended, no fresh catalyst.
Linked to AI infrastructure (S1 172); rallied 3 points today; may be starting major move; beneficiary of AI data center buildout.
Makes chips for Google and others; tech semis company; solid diversification holding.
Semiconductor equipment maker; makes chips for Google; diversified tech play.
Infrastructure supplier to OpenAI and hyperscalers; benefits from data center buildout but subject to OpenAI fundraising/market share risk.
Down ~$100 from highs; Hock Tan delivers quarter after quarter on software, hardware, Google work expansion. Represents one of the cheaper AI plays with expanding margins.
Great company but too expensive right now; wait for pullback, expect CEO Hock Tan to execute buybacks with strong earnings.
Google's capex spending flowing to Broadcom; beneficiary of AI infrastructure buildout.
Huge multi-year semiconductor winner crushed alongside KLA, Micron, Western Digital. Program selling was relentless and indiscriminate—not based on individual company fundamentals.
$1.5T company making semis/software; clients include Alphabet; caught in software decline; too hard to own right now despite scale.
Stellar earnings today; gigantic semiconductor company with software division; ready to soar if export restrictions reversed.
Core holding for long-time investor (Chris) from pandemic low; strong performer; maintain position.
Marvell Tech threat: both make custom accelerator chips; Cramer stuck with Broadcom; today announced deals with Google AND Anthropic; stock +6%; chose not to listen to bait.

Trimmed Charitable Trust position today to build flexibility. Strong long-term fundamentals (dominant networking, custom chips for Meta, Anthropic, Google) but tech routinely pulls back; selling into strength to buy on dips is portfolio management discipline.
Dominant networking and custom chips; major Meta, Anthropic, Google customer; trimmed position today for portfolio flexibility.
3rd largest CIBR cybersecurity ETF holding; semiconductor/networking with embedded security; Cramer owns for Schwab Charitable Trust.
Trades at 33x sales — expensive but not Cerebras-level excess. Profitable market leader with strong competitive position.
Semiconductor powering AI alongside Nvidia and others; part of cohort displacing software.
Sleeper custom-chip supplier to Google, Meta, ByteDance, Anthropic. CEO Hock Tan constantly landing new clients. Charitable trust owns; generated big gains; owns for the long haul.
Club position at all-time high; expect good earnings but must be circumspect given elevated entry and likely profit-taking after beat.
Infrastructure semiconductor enabling data center buildout; beneficiary of Computex-validated infrastructure thesis.
